name: aggregator: --strict mode refuses to run when current tree hash differs from lock-pinned quality_standards_directory_hash
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro tree/google && printf 'source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: G
  authoritative_url: https://g.com
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-04T00:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:S
  fetch_frequency: daily
  fragility_tier: low
  license_note: MIT
rules: []
recommended_set: []
all_set: []
' > tree/google/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/lock.sh" --init && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --pin-to-lock && echo "# changed" >> tree/google/x.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runner.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --strict
